title: dolichos bicontortus
intro: Dolichos bicontortus, also known as the twisted dolichos, is a type of flowering plant in the legume family. The medicinal properties of Dolichos bicontortus include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties, which are used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Dolichos bicontortus include reducing fever, alleviating pain, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Dolichos bicontortus can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, and is often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being and combat various health problems.
